overview: A desktop-friendly web tool that helps students quickly identify why their Docker or Docker Compose projects are failing. Paste in a container name, click Analyze, and get an instant breakdown of the failure type, top causes, remediation steps, and highlighted evidence lines from logs.
features: Container dropdown with running and stopped containers
Automatic failure classification: Config, Network, or Dependency errors
Top 3 likely causes and actionable next steps per failure type
Evidence section showing the 5 most relevant log lines highlighted in red
CPU and memory usage, restart count, and exit code display
Sensitive value masking for passwords, tokens, and API keys
Docker Compose file parser showing services, ports, and env vars
Sample log files for testing without a real Docker setup
